name: Arjun Mehta
title: Full Stack Developer
summary: Passionate full-stack developer with 4+ years of experience building scalable web applications. Proven track record of delivering high-performance solutions that improve user experience and reduce system latency by up to 40%.

experience.description: Architected and built microservices for banking clients, handling millions of transactions daily with high reliability.
achievements: Reduced API latency by 40% through query optimization and caching strategies
Built real-time data processing pipeline handling 1M+ requests/day
Mentored 3 junior developers on best practices and code reviews
Led architecture decisions for microservices adoption across 5 teams

experience.description: Developed and maintained React-based dashboard serving thousands of daily active users.
achievements: Built React dashboard used by 10K+ daily active users
Implemented real-time notifications using WebSockets with <100ms latency
Improved Lighthouse performance score from 65 to 92
Reduced bundle size by 35% through code splitting and lazy loading

experience.description: Contributed to UI component development and open-source projects.
achievements: Built responsive UI components following design specifications
Contributed to React component library with 500+ GitHub stars
Fixed 50+ bugs and improved code quality across the codebase

projects.title: TaskFlow
projects.tagline: Project management app with AI task suggestions
projects.description: A Trello-like application with AI-powered task prioritization using OpenAI API. Supports teams of up to 50 users with real-time collaboration via WebSockets. Integrated with Stripe for payments.

projects.title: PriceWatch
projects.description: Tracks prices across Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho. Sends WhatsApp/email alerts when prices drop using Twilio integration.

projects.title: CodeSnap
projects.description: Generate stunning code screenshots for social media. Features 15+ themes, custom backgrounds, export as PNG/SVG. Built with Next.js and Canvas API.

projects.title: Climate Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time weather data visualization dashboard with 72-hour forecasts and historical trends analysis.
